ads.prompt: A sleek, high-energy health advertisement for Dr. Berg's wellness brand. Dynamic visuals of a person waking up energized, preparing a clean keto meal, and moving with confidence and vitality. Bold text overlays: 'Dr. Berg - Unlock Real Health'. Bright modern color palette, cinematic lighting, uplifting music atmosphere. Professional TV commercial quality. 16:9 format.

An authentic UGC-style testimonial advertisement for Dr. Berg's health program. A relatable person speaks directly to camera in a warmly lit home kitchen, confidently sharing how they lost weight and gained energy through intermittent fasting. Genuine, trustworthy tone. On-screen text: 'I lost 35 lbs following Dr. Berg's method'. Before-and-after visual cues. Vertical 9:16 social media format, TikTok/Reels ready.

An educational informational advertisement for Dr. Berg's YouTube health channel. A confident doctor-like expert in a clean studio with a whiteboard and animated health charts explains the science behind intermittent fasting and ketosis. Animated graphics overlay key statistics. Text: 'Dr. Berg Explains: Why You Can't Lose Weight'. Authoritative yet approachable tone, professional lighting. 16:9 format.
